title: Customer Portal, Bilingual UI, Services Redesign, Adaptive Gallery, and Full Admin Content Editor

requirements.text: Implement a customer self-service portal: customers register/login using their email address or mobile number (no Internet Identity required). Each customer gets a unique profile page that shows all quotation/work orders they have submitted to the business, including status, dates, and any negotiation history. The portal must be accessible via a dedicated route (e.g., /customer/login and /customer/portal). Backend must store customer credentials (email or mobile, hashed password) and associate all quotations with the logged-in customer account.

quotes: evry customer need to have a his owne pages diffrently log in with his email or mobile number link because he need to see on future how many works he will do from me

acceptanceCriteria: A customer can register using an email address or mobile number plus a password.
A customer can log in using their credentials and land on a personal portal page.
The portal page lists all work orders / quotations submitted by that customer with status, dates, and history.
Customers cannot see other customers' data.
Backend associates quotations with the customer's account by email or mobile number.

requirements.text: Display English and Telugu text together side-by-side (or stacked) throughout the entire app for all user-facing labels, headings, buttons, and content sections. Both languages should be visible simultaneously without requiring a language toggle, though the toggle can remain as an optional preference. Update all translation usage across pages (HomePage, ServicesPage, AboutPage, ContactUsPage, ProjectGalleryPage, etc.) to render both English and Telugu strings together.

quotes: Need telugu english version together on app

acceptanceCriteria: All major headings and labels on every page show both English and Telugu text simultaneously.
No page requires switching language to see translated content.
Existing LanguageContext and translation files are leveraged without breaking the toggle for any remaining preference features.

requirements.text: Redesign the Our Services section on ServicesPage and the services preview on HomePage: remove all A/B/C alphabetic labels/prefixes from service items. Replace with visually attractive cards that display sample printing work images, short video clips or video embed thumbnails, and visual previews of printing outputs (e.g., banners, business cards, flex prints). Add a dedicated 'Printing Samples & Videos' showcase section on the HomePage featuring real sample images and video content. Admin must be able to manage the service images and video URLs through the admin panel (see REQ-6).

quotes: remove on A,b,c, on Our Services and make atractive with samples off printings show on home page and videos also add

acceptanceCriteria: No alphabetic prefix labels (A, B, C, etc.) appear on any service listing.
Service cards display a sample image or video thumbnail relevant to the service type.
HomePage has a dedicated section showcasing printing sample images and embedded video previews.
Admin can upload/update service sample images and video URLs from the admin panel.

requirements.text: Update ProjectGalleryPage so that each photo displays at its natural aspect ratio (intrinsic proportions). Use a masonry or variable-height grid layout so portrait, landscape, and square images each render at their correct proportions scaled to fit within a reasonable column width, rather than being cropped or forced into a uniform square/fixed-height container.

quotes: on project galery photos will display as they look as per scale it will gone fitt not only one size

acceptanceCriteria: Gallery images are displayed with their original aspect ratios preserved (no forced crop to a single uniform height).
A masonry or variable-height grid layout is used so images of different shapes fit naturally.
The layout remains responsive across mobile and desktop screen sizes.
No image appears stretched or distorted.

requirements.text: Build a comprehensive Admin Content Editor that allows the admin to edit all dynamic content in the app from the admin panel. This must cover: (a) Contact Details (phone, email, address, WhatsApp number, Google Maps link); (b) Services list — add, edit, delete services including name, description, sample images, and video URLs; (c) Business Hours — set opening/closing times per day of the week; (d) Project Gallery — add, edit, delete gallery projects with image, title, category, and description; (e) Homepage content — hero text, feature highlights, and promotional banners; (f) About page content. All editable content must be persisted in the backend and fetched dynamically on the frontend (no hardcoded static content). Extend the backend data model to store services, business hours, and homepage/about content as stable mutable records.

quotes: make editable evrything on app as admin need like contact deatils and services and busness hours and Project Gallery evrything he cam

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard has management pages for: Contact Details, Services, Business Hours, Project Gallery, and Homepage/About content.
Admin can create, update, and delete entries in each of those sections.
All content changes are persisted to the backend and immediately reflected on the public-facing pages.
Business hours can be set per day (Mon–Sun) with open/close times.
No user-facing page contains hardcoded text that the admin should be able to change.
Only authenticated admins can access the edit interfaces.

constraints: All backend logic must remain in the single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo).
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Customer login (email/mobile) is a separate auth flow from the existing Internet Identity and admin auth — do not merge or break existing admin authentication.
Existing quotation data and project gallery data must remain intact after the migration.
nonGoals: No SMS OTP or email verification for customer registration (simple password-based login is sufficient for now).
No real-time notifications or WebSocket features.
No mobile app (React Native) — web only.
Removing the existing language toggle component is not required.

required: Attractive banner printing sample showing a colorful large-format outdoor banner with vivid graphics (print-sample-banner.dim_800x450.png)
Business card printing sample showing a premium matte business card with modern design (print-sample-business-card.dim_800x450.png)
Flex printing sample showing a bright flex board with Telugu and English text on a storefront (print-sample-flex.dim_800x450.png)
Brochure / pamphlet printing sample showing an open tri-fold brochure with vibrant print (print-sample-brochure.dim_800x450.png)
